statement: Transform structural intent rather than copying melodic phrases.
rationale: Consensus rows repeatedly reject direct source-copy behavior.
transformation_not_copy_note: Original generation only; no phrase-level copying from source material.

statement: Use meter and groove hints as guidance with room for reinterpretation.
rationale: Witnesses offer probabilistic meter hints with disagreements preserved.
transformation_not_copy_note: Original generation only; no phrase-level copying from source material.

statement: When witnesses conflict, carry conflict into composition constraints.
rationale: Consensus schema stores qualitative conflicts explicitly.
transformation_not_copy_note: Original generation only; no phrase-level copying from source material.

statement: Downgrade confidence where no real backend confirms observations.
rationale: Many rows mark no_real_backend_confirmation in weak evidence areas.
transformation_not_copy_note: Original generation only; no phrase-level copying from source material.

statement: Only analyze raw audio when manifest analysis_allowed is true.
rationale: Study manifest explicitly separates authorization and analysis policies.
transformation_not_copy_note: Original generation only; no phrase-level copying from source material.
